  • Package
  • Class

  • Help

Uses of Class
org.moeaframework.core.Solution

Packages that use Solution
Package
Description
org.moeaframework.algorithm
Implementations of various algorithms and support tools for working with algorithms.
org.moeaframework.algorithm.extension
 
org.moeaframework.algorithm.pso
Implementations of various Particle Swarm Optimization (PSO) algorithms.
org.moeaframework.algorithm.sa
Implementations of various simulated annealing (SA) algorithms.
org.moeaframework.algorithm.single
Implementations of various single-objective optimization algorithms.
org.moeaframework.analysis.collector
Collectors record information periodically during the execution of an algorithm.
org.moeaframework.analysis.diagnostics
Diagnostic tool for analyzing the runtime behavior of algorithms.
org.moeaframework.core
Contains the core classes used by this framework.
org.moeaframework.core.attribute
Convenience methods for reading and writing attributes.
org.moeaframework.core.comparator
Contains dominance comparators and other comparators used by this framework.
org.moeaframework.core.fitness
Implementations of various fitness assignment methods.
org.moeaframework.core.indicator
Collection of unary quality indicators for comparing the quality of non-dominated approximation sets.
org.moeaframework.core.initialization
Package of various initialization operators.
org.moeaframework.core.operator
Package of various mutation and crossover operators.
org.moeaframework.core.operator.binary
Collection of operators for binary-encoded variables.
org.moeaframework.core.operator.grammar
Collection of operators for grammars for use with Grammatical Evolution (GE).
org.moeaframework.core.operator.program
Collection of operators for expression trees for use with Genetic Programming (GP).
org.moeaframework.core.operator.real
Collection of operators for real-encoded variables.
org.moeaframework.core.penalty
Collection of penalty functions.
org.moeaframework.core.selection
Package of various selection operators.
org.moeaframework.core.termination
Defines conditions for terminating runs.
org.moeaframework.core.variable
Defines the various decision variables that may be used.
org.moeaframework.parallel
Support for distributed and parallel computing for optimization algorithms.
org.moeaframework.parallel.util
Utilities for building parallel algorithms, including thread-safe versions of some classes.
org.moeaframework.problem
Package containing standardized problems and utility classes for working with problems.
org.moeaframework.problem.BBOB2016
Package containing the BBOB 2016 bi-objective test problems.
org.moeaframework.problem.CDTLZ
Package for the constrained DTLZ test problems.
org.moeaframework.problem.CEC2009
Test problems used for the CEC 2009 special session and competition.
org.moeaframework.problem.DTLZ
Package for the scalable DTLZ test problem suite.
org.moeaframework.problem.LSMOP
Package for the scalable LSMOP test problem suite.
org.moeaframework.problem.LZ
Package for the complicated Pareto sets test suite by Hui Li and Qingfu Zhang.
org.moeaframework.problem.MaF
The MaF test problem suite for many-objective optimization.
org.moeaframework.problem.misc
Collection of unconstrained and constrained numeric multiobjective test problems aggregated by Van Veldhuizen [1].
org.moeaframework.problem.single
Collection of single-objective optimization algorithms.
org.moeaframework.problem.WFG
Implementation of the Walking Fish Group (WFG) test suite of scalable multiobjective problems.
org.moeaframework.problem.ZCAT
Package for the scalable ZCAT test problem suite.
org.moeaframework.problem.ZDT
Package for the ZDT test problem suite.
org.moeaframework.util.clustering
Support for clustering of solutions, either using their decision variables (if numeric) or objective values.

    Methods in org.moeaframework.algorithm that return Solution
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected Solution
    ReferencePointNondominatedSortingPopulation.findExtremePoint(int objective)
    Returns the extreme point in the given objective.
    protected Solution
    ReferencePointNondominatedSortingPopulation.findSolutionWithMinimumDistance(List<Solution> solutions, double[] weight)
    Returns the solution with the minimum perpendicular distance to the given reference point.
    Solution
    MSOPSRankedPopulation.get(int index)
     
    protected Solution
    PESA2.RegionBasedSelection.select()
    Selects one solution using PESA2's region-based selection scheme.
    Solution[]
    PESA2.RegionBasedSelection.select(int arity, Population population)
     
    protected Solution
    ReferenceVectorGuidedPopulation.select(List<Solution> solutions, int index)
    Select the solution with the smallest penalized distance.
    Solution
    PAES.test(Solution parent, Solution offspring)
    The test procedure to determine which solution, the parent or offspring, moves on to the next generation.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected List<List<Solution>>
    ReferencePointNondominatedSortingPopulation.associateToReferencePoint(Population population)
    Associates each solution to the nearest reference point, returning a list-of-lists.
    protected List<List<Solution>>
    ReferenceVectorGuidedPopulation.associateToReferencePoint(Population population)
    Associates each solution to the nearest reference vector, returning a list-of-lists.

    PESA2.createGridMap()
    Returns a mapping from grid index to the solutions occupying that grid index.

    PESA2.RegionBasedSelection.draw()
    Draws a random entry from the map.

    MSOPSRankedPopulation.iterator()

    boolean
    MSOPSRankedPopulation.add(Solution solution)
     
    protected void
    EpsilonMOEA.addToPopulation(Solution newSolution)
    Adds the new solution to the population if is non-dominated with the current population, removing either a randomly-selected dominated solution or a non-dominated solution.

    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    MSOPSRankedPopulation(List<double[]> weights, Iterable<? extends Solution> iterable)
    Constructs a population initialized with the specified solutions that maintains the rank attribute for its solutions using the MSOPS ranking method.

    Constructs a new population with the specified solutions that maintains the rank attribute for its solutions.

    Constructs a new population with the specified solutions that maintains the rank attribute for its solutions.

    Constructs a new population for RVEA.

    Evaluates the solution, updating the solution's objectives in place.

    Algorithm.evaluateAll(Solution[] solutions)

    Variation.evolve(Solution[] parents)
    Evolves one or more parent solutions (specified by getArity) and produces one or more child solutions.
    int
    AdaptiveGridArchive.findIndex(Solution solution)
    Returns the index of the specified solution in this adaptive grid archive, or -1 if the solution is not within the current lower and upper bounds.

    NondominatedPopulation.forceAddWithoutCheck(Solution newSolution)
    Adds the specified solution to the population, bypassing the non-domination check.
    int
    Population.indexOf(Solution solution)
    Returns the index of the specified solution in this population.
    protected boolean
    NondominatedPopulation.isDuplicate(Solution s1, Solution s2)
    Returns true if the two solutions are duplicates and one should be ignored based on the duplicate mode.

    Solution.manhattanDistance(Solution otherSolution)
    Computes the Manhattan distance (or L1-norm) between two solutions in objective space.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    Population.addAll(Iterable<? extends Solution> iterable)
    Adds a collection of solutions to this population.
    boolean
    Population.containsAll(Iterable<? extends Solution> iterable)
    Returns true if this population contains all the solutions in the specified collection; false otherwise.
    double
    Solution.distanceToNearestSolution(Population population, DistanceMeasure<Solution> distanceMeasure)
    Returns the distance, as calculated by the given distance measure, from this solution to the nearest solution in the population.

    Algorithm.evaluateAll(Iterable<Solution> solutions)
    Evaluates the specified solutions.
    Population
    Population.filter(Predicate<? super Solution> predicate)
    Returns a new population containing only the solutions matching the given predicate.
    boolean
    Population.removeAll(Iterable<? extends Solution> iterable)
    Removes all solutions in the specified collection from this population.
    boolean
    Population.removeAll(Predicate<? super Solution> predicate)
    Removes all solutions matching the given predicate.

    NondominatedSortingPopulation.sort(Comparator<? super Solution> comparator)

    Sorts the solutions in this population using the specified comparator.
    void
    NondominatedSortingPopulation.truncate(int size, Comparator<? super Solution> comparator)
     
    void
    Population.truncate(int size, Comparator<? super Solution> comparator)
    Sorts this population using the specified comparator and removes the last (maximum) solutions until this population's size is within the specified size.
    Constructors in org.moeaframework.core with parameters of type Solution
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    Population(T[] solutions)
    Constructs a population initialized with an array of solutions.
    protected
    Solution(Solution solution)
    Copy constructor.
    Constructor parameters in org.moeaframework.core with type arguments of type Solution
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    EpsilonBoxDominanceArchive(double[] epsilons, Iterable<? extends Solution> iterable)
    Constructs an ε-box dominance archive using an additive ε-box dominance comparator with the specified ε values and initialized with the specified solutions.
     
    EpsilonBoxDominanceArchive(double epsilon, Iterable<? extends Solution> iterable)
    Constructs an ε-box dominance archive using an additive ε-box dominance comparator with the specified ε and initialized with the specified solutions.
     
    EpsilonBoxDominanceArchive(EpsilonBoxDominanceComparator comparator, Iterable<? extends Solution> iterable)
    Constructs an ε-box dominance archive using the specified ε-box dominance comparator and initialized with the specified solutions.
     
    EpsilonBoxDominanceArchive(Epsilons epsilons, Iterable<? extends Solution> iterable)
    Constructs an ε-box dominance archive using an additive ε-box dominance comparator with the specified ε values and initialized with the specified solutions.
     
    NondominatedPopulation(Iterable<? extends Solution> iterable)
    Constructs a non-dominated population using the Pareto dominance relation and initialized with the specified solutions.
     
    NondominatedPopulation(DominanceComparator comparator, Iterable<? extends Solution> iterable)
    Constructs a non-dominated population using the specified dominance comparator and initialized with the specified solutions.
     
    NondominatedSortingPopulation(Iterable<? extends Solution> iterable)
    Constructs a population initialized with the specified solutions that maintains the rank and crowdingDistance attributes for its solutions.
     
    NondominatedSortingPopulation(DominanceComparator comparator, Iterable<? extends Solution> iterable)
    Constructs a population initialized with the specified solutions that maintains the rank and crowdingDistance attributes for its solutions.
     
    Population(Iterable<? extends Solution> iterable)
    Constructs a population initialized with a collection of solutions.

  • Uses of Solution in org.moeaframework.core.comparator

    Methods in org.moeaframework.core.comparator with parameters of type Solution
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    int
    AggregateConstraintComparator.compare(Solution solution1, Solution solution2)
     
    int
    ChainedComparator.compare(Solution solution1, Solution solution2)
     
    int
    CrowdingComparator.compare(Solution solution1, Solution solution2)
     
    int
    DominanceComparator.compare(Solution solution1, Solution solution2)
    Compares the two solutions using a dominance relation, returning -1 if solution1 dominates solution2, 1 if solution2 dominates solution1, and 0 if the solutions are non-dominated.
    int
    EpsilonBoxDominanceComparator.compare(Solution solution1, Solution solution2)
     
    int
    EpsilonBoxObjectiveComparator.compare(Solution solution1, Solution solution2)
    Compares the two solutions using the additive ε-box dominance relation.
    int
    FitnessComparator.compare(Solution solution1, Solution solution2)

    LexicographicalComparator.compare(Solution a, Solution b)

    ParetoObjectiveComparator.compare(Solution solution1, Solution solution2)

    IndicatorFitnessEvaluator.calculateIndicator(Solution solution1, Solution solution2)
    Returns the indicator value relative to the two solutions.

  • Uses of Solution in org.moeaframework.core.variable

    Methods in org.moeaframework.core.variable with parameters of type Solution
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static int[]
    EncodingUtils.getInt(Solution solution)
    Returns the array of integer-valued decision variables stored in a solution.
    static int[]
    EncodingUtils.getInt(Solution solution, int startIndex, int endIndex)
    Returns the array of integer-valued decision variables stored in a solution between the specified indices.
    static double[]
    EncodingUtils.getReal(Solution solution)
    Returns the array of floating-point decision variables stored in a solution.
    static double[]
    EncodingUtils.getReal(Solution solution, int startIndex, int endIndex)
    Returns the array of floating-point decision variables stored in a solution between the specified indices.
    static void
    EncodingUtils.setInt(Solution solution, int[] values)
    Sets the values of all integer-valued decision variables stored in the solution.
    static void
    EncodingUtils.setInt(Solution solution, int startIndex, int endIndex, int[] values)
    Sets the values of the integer-valued decision variables stored in a solution between the specified indices.
    static void
    EncodingUtils.setReal(Solution solution, double[] values)
    Sets the values of all floating-point decision variables stored in the solution.
    static void
    EncodingUtils.setReal(Solution solution, int startIndex, int endIndex, double[] values)
    Sets the values of the floating-point decision variables stored in a solution between the specified indices.

    Description

    Returns the solution.
